title: Please Be My Friend!
overview: Ashiya Mizuki is a girl but she attends an all-boys school because high jumper Sano Izumi is there.

title: I Want to Be with You
overview: The school doctor Umeda and Sano figure out that Mizuki is a girl. Can she continue staying at the school?

title: I Won't Lose!
overview: After Sano stops his friend Rika from slapping Mizuki and yells at Rika, Mizuki and Sano get into a fight.

title: The Source of Strength
overview: Sano decides to rejoin the track team, but then his old rival Kagurazaka shows up to provoke him.

title: Do They Hate Me?
overview: Sano doesn't seem to remember the last night, but Mizuki also has other troubles: someone has it out for her.

title: My Big Brother's Coming
overview: Mizuki's brother Shizuki unexpectedly comes to Japan. Can she keep keep her secret while he's here?

title: Because I'm a Guy!
overview: Dorm 2 is being renovated, so Mizuki needs a place to stay for 2 weeks. Desperate, she turns to Umeda...

title: It's Not Like We Could Become Lovers
overview: Tamami is all over Sano, putting Mizuki into a strange mood about her and Sano's relationship.

title: Can Things Stay This Way?
overview: Io asks Mizuki if she wants things with Sano to stay this way. Later, Mizuki is in danger!

title: I Don't Look Good in Women's Clothing!
overview: It's festival time for Osaka High. The winning dorms gets special privileges, so things get heated.

title: Nanba-Senpai?
overview: Dorm 1 plays dirty in the chicken fight against Mizuki's team. Later Nanba has a heated exchange with a woman.
